{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Kholien
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Kholien]] is a starship with computers and a bridge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
